// Enabled: Master switch. When false, no patches are applied.
// LimitlessRegenEnabled: When true, players who have banked a Limitless Lockpick (WCID 30253) receive passive Lockpick Durability regen at the interval below.
// LimitlessRegenIntervalSeconds: Seconds between passive regen grants for Limitless Lockpick holders (default 21600 = 6 hours).
// LimitlessRegenChargesPerInterval: Lockpick Durability granted per Limitless Lockpick each interval (default 600; stacks multiplicatively with each additional Limitless Lockpick banked).
// RequireLockpickSkill: When true, only characters with Lockpick trained or specialized can auto-bank lockpick items and use banked durability on locks.
